query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bioimpedance_exams (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  trainer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  client_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  date DATE NOT NULL,
  weight DECIMAL(6,2),
  muscle_mass DECIMAL(6,2),
  muscle_pct DECIMAL(5,2),
  body_fat_pct DECIMAL(5,2),
  visceral_fat DECIMAL(5,2),
  perimetria TEXT,
  dobras TEXT,
  image_url TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_bioimpedance_exams_trainer ON bioimpedance_exams(trainer_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_bioimpedance_exams_client ON bioimpedance_exams(client_id);
